label: Day 5 — Afternoon: Discovering Istanbul
description: A free afternoon to explore Istanbul — guided by a curated green lens. Participants receive a suggested route connecting sustainability-relevant spots in the city. No formal structure — just curiosity and discovery.
objectives: Experience Istanbul as a living, breathing sustainability case study
Build cultural connection with the host city beyond the venue
Rest and recharge after four intense programme days
Gather material for the Green Map (local spots, practices, stories)

steps.title: Istanbul Green Explorer briefing
steps.body: Facilitator presents the suggested route using the interactive Istanbul map below. Each participant chooses at least 2 'green stops' to visit.

steps.title: Free exploration
steps.body: Participants explore in self-organised small groups. No facilitator presence — genuine free time. WhatsApp group active for coordination and sharing discoveries in real time.

steps.title: Optional: evening sharing
steps.body: At dinner, a voluntary round: one thing I found in Istanbul today that belongs on our Green Map. No pressure — just a door left open.

facilitatorNote: Prepare the map in advance with verified locations — check opening hours, especially for community gardens which may require appointment. Include a mix of well-known spots and hidden gems. The goal is discovery, not tourism.
